description: Implement mandatory permissions auth strategy: require Calendar, Tasks, and Slides scopes at sign-in; make Gmail optional; update settings UI to show core services as always-connected; update backend status endpoint.
steps: 1. Update route.ts: Add Slides scopes, remove Gmail scope, add signIn callback that rejects if no access_token, add jwt guard
2. Update page.tsx (landing): Show error banner when ?error= query param present
3. Update settings/page.tsx: Remove Calendar/Tasks/Slides from GOOGLE_SERVICES, keep only Gmail, add Core Services section
4. Update integrations.py: Calendar/Tasks/Slides always return connected:true in /status
5. Update user_context.py: Calendar/Tasks/Slides always available, only check Gmail
acceptance_criteria: route.ts requests calendar, tasks, presentations, drive.file scopes (not gmail.modify)
route.ts has signIn callback that rejects sign-in when no access_token
Landing page shows error banner on ?error= query param
Settings page shows Calendar, Tasks, Slides as core services (no buttons)
Settings page only shows Gmail as toggleable service
Backend /status returns connected:true for calendar, tasks, slides always
user_context.py treats calendar, tasks, slides as always connected
python3 -m py_compile passes on all modified backend files
